title: Don't use Fable 5 in Claude… do this instead
summary: David Ondrej advises against using Fable 5 with Claude, suggesting an alternative method instead. The video is positioned as guidance for developers learning to code with AI.
writeup: David Ondrej argues against pairing Fable 5 with Claude and presents an alternative method, framing the video as guidance for developers learning to code with AI. The discussion draws on prompt engineering and model compression to make its case. The main takeaway is the recommended approach to use in place of Fable 5.
